svg.title: Netbox architecture diagram
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing Netbox's layered architecture: Game layer at top, Netbox SDK in the middle with auth and transport abstraction, and transport implementations and backend services at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the game layer do in Netbox?')
sendPrompt('How would I write a MirrorTransport?')
sendPrompt('How would I write a FishNetTransport?')
sendPrompt('What does PlayFab do in Netbox?')
sendPrompt('What Photon servers does Netbox connect to?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cloudflare Worker do in Netbox?')
